panelists.name: Sarah Chen
panelists.expertise: Investigative journalist specializing in wellness and human behavior
panelists.voice_style: Neutral, curious, guides conversation without dominating

panelists.name: Dr. Aris Thorne
panelists.expertise: Researcher in metabolic health, longevity, and physiological adaptation
panelists.voice_style: Scientific but accessible, focuses on mechanisms and research

panelists.name: Dr. Amara Singh
panelists.expertise: Comparative religion scholar and historian of contemplative traditions
panelists.voice_style: Contextual and philosophical, connects ancient wisdom to modern practice

panelists.name: Marcus Vane
panelists.expertise: Clinical psychologist specializing in behavioral health and eating disorders
panelists.voice_style: Practical and cautious, highlights psychological risks and benefits

panelists.name: Elena Morales
panelists.voice_style: Reverent but warm, creates space for reflection

panelists.name: Dr. James Whitfield
panelists.voice_style: Scholarly but devotional, grounds discussion in tradition

panelists.name: Sister Catherine
panelists.expertise: Benedictine nun with 40 years of contemplative practice
panelists.voice_style: Experiential and humble, speaks from lived practice

panelists.name: Alex Rivera
panelists.voice_style: Enthusiastic and accessible, makes science engaging

panelists.name: Dr. Yuki Tanaka
panelists.expertise: Inorganic chemist specializing in elemental properties

panelists.name: Dr. Michael Brooks
panelists.expertise: Historian of science and discovery narratives

panelists.name: Jordan Lee
panelists.voice_style: Curious and practical, connects theory to everyday decisions

panelists.name: Dr. Maya Patel
panelists.expertise: Researcher in cognitive biases and decision-making under uncertainty
panelists.voice_style: Evidence-based and precise, grounds discussion in research

panelists.name: Alex Chen
panelists.expertise: Former management consultant who applies mental models to business decisions
panelists.voice_style: Practical and concrete, focuses on real-world application

panelists.name: Dr. Sarah Morrison
panelists.expertise: Studies how people actually think versus how they believe they think

script_guidelines.fact_checking: All research citations and claims must be verified against source material
